ideation: This animation sequence shows the robot carefully holding a can of food.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing care.  The robot will use both arms to cradle the can, suggesting a gentle and protective action. Frame 1 shows the robot's arms slightly raised, preparing to receive the can. Frame 2 shows the can being gently placed in the robot's arms. Frame 3 shows the robot holding the can steadily. Frame 4 shows the robot slowly lowering the can.  Frame 5 shows the can resting on a surface. This sequence conveys careful handling and respect for the food.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, ready to receive
arms open wider to cradle the can
both arms carefully hold the can steady
arms begin to lower the can gently
arms release the can to rest on a surface
